message:
feat(config): add safety config for data recovery (caam-3w5)

Add SafetyConfig to SPMConfig with two settings:

1. auto_backup_before_switch: Controls automatic backups before profile switches
   - "always": Backup before every switch
   - "smart": Backup only if state doesn't match any vault profile (default)
   - "never": No automatic backups (not recommended)

2. max_auto_backups: Limits timestamped auto-backups (default: 5)
   Set to 0 for unlimited backups.

Also fixes browser/urldetect.go:
- Add missing GetURLs() method to OutputCapture
- Update tests to call Flush() after Write() for line-buffered detection

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
